item.title: 🔥DeepSeek-V4-Pro API is 75% OFF until May 5th, 2026, 15:59 (UTC Time)! Don't miss out on this massiv...
item.description:
🔥DeepSeek-V4-Pro API is 75% OFF until May 5th, 2026, 15:59 (UTC Time)! Don't miss out on this massive discount.
🛠️Integration Updates: 🔹Claude Code: Set model to deepseek-v4-pro[1m] to unlock 1M context! 🔹OpenCode: Update to v1.14.24+ 🔹OpenClaw: Update to v2026.4.24+
Check the latest official API docs for full details: https://t.co/9J9ZedDpyU
--- @deepseek_ai | ❤️ 945 | 🔁 109 | 💬 70 | 👁 27871
item.author: @deepseek_ai
